ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation
ham.body:
Dear Alex Thompson,

Thank you for choosing SkyWay Airlines. Your flight has been successfully booked and confirmed. Below are your itinerary details:

• Flight number: SW1234
• Departure: JFK International Airport – 10:45 AM, 27 April 2026
• Arrival: LAX International Airport – 1:30 PM, 27 April 2026
• Cabin class: Business
• Seat assignment: 12A
• Baggage allowance: 2 checked bags, 1 carry‑on

Please review the information and let us know if any changes are required. You can also download your boarding pass by clicking <URL>.

We look forward to serving you.

Sincerely,

SkyWay Airlines Customer Service
support@skyway.com
+1 800-555-0199

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required to Avoid Missed Delivery Fee
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

This is an official notification from FedEx/DHL Customer Support. Your shipment with Tracking ID: 9Z12345ABC6789012 was scheduled for delivery on 25 April 2026 but was not successfully delivered.

To prevent an additional missed delivery fee of $50.00, you must confirm or update your shipping address within the next 24 hours. Please click the link below to verify your details:

<URL>

Failure to respond will result in an automatic charge to your account and possible suspension of future shipments.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,

FedEx/DHL Delivery Team
support@fedex.com
+1 800-345-6789
